description_long: This bungalow features a rectangular structure with a red gable roof and a prominent overhang on one side, providing shade to a small porch area. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, and the building sits on a raised platform with a stone or concrete base. Large, rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged along the front facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior. A covered porch with railings is visible at the front, accessible by a short set of steps. Adjacent to the bungalow is a mature deciduous tree with orange-brown foliage, suggesting an autumn setting. The overall design is simple yet functional, typical of suburban or residential neighborhoods.
description: A rectangular bungalow with a red gable roof, light exterior walls, symmetrical windows, and a covered front porch, accompanied by an autumnal tree.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long red gable roof, light walls, and the tree positioned next to the building.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the covered porch, entrance steps, and the roof overhang extending above the porch.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the symmetrical window arrangement, main entrance, and the tree to the right.
description_view_3: Rear aerial view emphasizing the roof and the dense foliage of the adjacent tree.
